name: Max Planck
role: Father of Quantum Theory — Nobel Prize 1918
quote: A new scientific truth does not triumph by convincing its opponents and making them see the light, but rather because its opponents eventually die, and a new generation grows up that is familiar with it.

name: Albert Einstein
role: Photoelectric Effect & Light Quanta — Nobel Prize 1921
quote: God does not play dice with the universe.

name: Niels Bohr
role: Atomic Model & Copenhagen Interpretation — Nobel Prize 1922
quote: Anyone who is not shocked by quantum theory has not understood it.

name: Werner Heisenberg
role: Matrix Mechanics & Uncertainty Principle — Nobel Prize 1932
quote: Not only is the Universe stranger than we think, it is stranger than we can think.

name: Erwin Schrödinger
role: Wave Equation & Entanglement — Nobel Prize 1933
quote: If we are going to stick to this damned quantum-jumping, then I regret that I ever had anything to do with quantum theory.

name: Paul Dirac
role: Relativistic Quantum Theory & Antimatter — Nobel Prize 1933
quote: A theory with mathematical beauty is more likely to be correct than an ugly one that fits some experimental data.

name: Wolfgang Pauli
role: Exclusion Principle & Spin — Nobel Prize 1945
quote: I don't mind your thinking slowly; I mind your publishing faster than you think.

name: Max Born
role: Probabilistic Interpretation of Wave Function — Nobel Prize 1954
quote: The motion of particles conforms to the laws of probability, but probability itself propagates in conformity with the law of causality.

name: Louis de Broglie
role: Matter Wave Hypothesis — Nobel Prize 1929
quote: The electron can no longer be conceived as a single, small granule of electricity; it must be associated with a wave, and this wave is no myth; its wavelength can be measured and its interferences predicted.

name: Richard Feynman
role: QED, Path Integrals & Quantum Computer Visionary — Nobel Prize 1965
quote: If you think you understand quantum mechanics, you don't understand quantum mechanics.

name: John Stewart Bell
role: Bell's Theorem — Decisive Test of Quantum Nonlocality
quote: The reasonable thing is to expect that quantum mechanics will be superseded by something more intelligible. But maybe it's the other way around; maybe it's the world that is weird.

name: Alain Aspect
role: Bell Test Experiments — Nobel Prize 2022
quote: There is no doubt that Bell's inequality is violated by quantum mechanics. What Nature is telling us is that the world is nonlocal.

name: David Bohm
role: Pilot Wave Interpretation & Quantum Implicate Order
quote: There is an implicate order in the universe, and in it, the enfolded and unfolded aspects of reality are inseparably linked.

name: Hugh Everett III
role: Many-Worlds Interpretation (Relative State Formulation)
quote: The wave function is real, and all its branches are equally real. We simply find ourselves in one branch, unaware of the others.

name: David Deutsch
role: Founder of Quantum Computing Theory — Oxford
quote: Quantum computation is… a distinctively new way of harnessing nature… It will be the first technology that allows useful tasks to be performed in collaboration between parallel universes.

name: Peter Shor
role: Shor's Factoring Algorithm & Quantum Error Correction — Bell Labs / MIT
quote: The algorithm I found in 1994 shows that a quantum computer could break RSA encryption. This means we need to think seriously about post-quantum cryptography.

name: John von Neumann
role: Mathematical Foundations of Quantum Mechanics
quote: In mathematics you don't understand things. You just get used to them.

name: Anton Zeilinger
role: Quantum Teleportation & Entanglement Experiments — Nobel Prize 2022
quote: The discovery of entanglement and Bell's work changed our understanding of reality. We now know that the world cannot be described by local realistic models.

name: Arnold Sommerfeld
role: Old Quantum Theory — Munich School (Trained Heisenberg & Pauli)
quote: Quantum theory is a great achievement, but its foundations are still not entirely clear. We must have the courage to work on those foundations.

name: Jian-Wei Pan
role: Quantum Communications — China's National Quantum Program
quote: We want to build a quantum internet connecting the entire planet — a network that is fundamentally secure because eavesdropping is physically impossible.

name: Jay Gambetta
role: VP Quantum Computing, IBM — Architect of IBM Quantum Network
quote: We are now entering the era of quantum utility — where quantum computers can tackle problems that are practically impossible to simulate classically.

name: Hartmut Neven
role: Founder, Google Quantum AI — Willow & Sycamore Architect
quote: With Willow, we have for the first time demonstrated that you can reduce errors while increasing the number of qubits. This is the critical threshold the field has been chasing for 30 years.

name: Ilyas Khan
role: CEO, Quantinuum — Driving Commercialization of Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing
quote: Helios represents the point at which quantum computing becomes genuinely useful for real-world problems. The age of generative quantum AI begins now.
